- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes, code improvements)

## Contributor Checklist

<!-- Please go through this checklist and make sure your PR is ready for review -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards (WordPress & PSR-12)
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint:js` and `npm run lint:css`
- [ ] I have run `composer lint` and fixed any PHPCS issues
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors

### Testing
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally in multiple browsers
- [ ] I have tested on both mobile and desktop (if applicable)
- [ ] I have tested with and without JavaScript enabled (if applicable)
- [ ] I have tested with different screen sizes and devices

### Documentation
- [ ] My changes are well-documented with inline comments
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I have added or updated block.json attributes if needed

### Final Checks
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have checked that all automated tests pass
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/aegiswp/theme/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) file
